Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built by traders, for prop traders. Every feature exists because it directly improves your edge — or shows you why you don't have one yet.

📊

See exactly where you're losing money

Equity curve, win rate, profit factor, expectancy and R-multiple — everything at a glance the moment you open the app.

🗓

Spot your worst trading periods instantly

GitHub-style annual heatmap with monthly breakdown. See your patterns before they cost you another funded account.

🧠

Track discipline, not just P&L

End-of-day review with customizable questions. Because most blown accounts aren't about strategy — they're about process.

📐

Stop leaving money on the table

MAE / MFE analysis shows how much of each move you captured. Most traders are shocked by what they find.

⚡

Forex, Futures, Stocks — one journal

Full multi-asset support. Switch between views in one click. No more spreadsheets for each account.

💸

Know your real prop firm income

Track payouts across all your funded accounts. Know exactly what you've taken out vs what you've made.

🏷

Analyse what actually matters to you

Create your own categories — setups, modes, entry quality. Find the patterns your broker's data never shows you.

📥

CSV Import

Import your entire trade history from MetaTrader 5 in seconds. No manual entry for historical data.

☁️

Cloud Sync

Your trades are saved to the cloud automatically. Access your journal from any device, anywhere, any time.

Visual Analytics

See every angle.

Every view you need to understand your trading — built into one clean interface.

Why MXOEDGE

The edge is in
your own data.

Most prop traders lose their account not because they don't know how to trade — but because they don't know which trades to take. MXOEDGE makes that visible.

🔁

You repeat the same mistakes

Without data, every trading day feels new. MXOEDGE surfaces patterns — so you stop losing on the same setups.

⏰

You don't know your best hours

Your P&L by session will tell you exactly when to trade — and when to walk away.

🎯

You overtrade on bad days

Track your emotional state alongside your trades. See what revenge-trading really costs you.

FAQ

Common questions.

Especially for you. Prop challenges fail because of emotional mistakes and rule violations — overtrading on bad days, revenge trading, not following your own process. The Daily Review and performance heatmap are built exactly to catch those patterns before they cost you a challenge. At $17/mo — less than a single bad trade — it's the cheapest risk management tool you'll add to your setup.
You enter your card details at signup, but nothing is charged for 7 days. You get full access to every feature from minute one. On day 8, your chosen plan kicks in automatically. Cancel any time before then and you pay absolutely nothing — no questions asked.
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee from the date of your first charge. If you're not happy for any reason, email us within 14 days and we'll refund you in full. No hoops, no interrogation. After 14 days, charges are non-refundable but you can cancel to stop future billing at any time.
Your founder price ($17/mo or $129/yr) is locked as long as you stay continuously subscribed. If you cancel and resubscribe later, you'll be charged the regular price at that time ($27/mo or $199/yr). So if you ever pause, pause before your trial ends — not after.
MXOEDGE is a professional trading journal built for prop traders and serious retail traders. It connects your trade data to real analytics — equity curves, heatmaps, MAE/MFE, Daily Reviews — so you can see exactly what's working and what's costing you money. If you're spending $300–600/mo on a prop firm challenge, this pays for itself the first time it stops you from making a bad trade.
MXOEDGE supports Forex, Futures, Stocks, and Crypto. You can log trades manually or import your full history via CSV from any broker. More broker integrations are on the roadmap.
Yes — import your entire CSV trade history in seconds. No manual entry required for past trades. For new trades you can either log them manually or import them at the end of each session.
Your data is yours and only yours. We use encrypted cloud storage (at rest and in transit). We never share, sell, or analyze your trading data. You can export or delete your data at any time.
Cancel any time from your account settings in one click — no email required, no cancellation call, no friction. You keep access until the end of your billing period. We don't do dark patterns.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 20, 2026

1. Who We Are

MXOEDGE ("we", "our", "us") operates the trading journal platform available at app.mxoedge.com. We are committed to protecting your personal data and handling it responsibly.

For any privacy-related questions, contact us at: [email protected]

2. What Data We Collect

When you create an account and use the platform, we collect:

  • Account data: Email address and encrypted password via Supabase Auth.
  • Trading journal data: Trade records, notes, daily reviews, and any data you enter into the journal. This data belongs to you.
  • Payment data: Billing is handled by Stripe. We do not store your card details — Stripe processes and stores all payment information securely.
  • Usage data: Basic usage patterns to improve the product (no third-party analytics tracking individuals).

3. How We Use Your Data

  • To provide and maintain the trading journal service.
  • To authenticate your account and manage your subscription.
  • To send transactional emails (account confirmation, password reset) via Resend.
  • To improve and develop the product based on aggregated usage patterns.

We do not sell your data. We do not share your trading data with third parties.

4. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored in a Supabase (PostgreSQL) database hosted in the EU (eu-west-1). Access is protected by Row Level Security — only you can read and write your own data. Connections are encrypted via TLS.

5. Third-Party Services

  • Supabase — database and authentication (EU region)
  • Stripe — payment processing
  • Resend — transactional email delivery
  • Cloudflare — CDN, DNS, and serverless functions
  • Crisp — live chat support

6. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. To request data deletion or export, contact us at [email protected]. We will respond within 30 days.

7. Data Retention

We retain your data for as long as your account is active. If you cancel your subscription and request deletion, we will permanently delete your account data within 30 days.

8. Cookies

We use only essential session cookies required to keep you logged in. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.

9. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy occasionally. If we make significant changes, we will notify you by email. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance.

Terms of Service

Last updated: March 20, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the MXOEDGE trading journal platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

2. Description of Service

MXOEDGE provides a professional trading journal tool for individual traders. The Service includes trade logging, analytics, performance tracking, and related features accessible at app.mxoedge.com.

3. Subscription & Billing

  • The Service is available via a free trial followed by a paid subscription.
  • Billing is processed securely through Stripe. By subscribing, you authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis.
  • You may cancel your subscription at any time through the billing portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
  • We do not offer refunds for partial periods unless required by applicable law.

4. Your Account

  • You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.
  • You must provide accurate information when creating your account.
  • One account per person. You may not share your account with others.
  • You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service.

5. Your Data

You retain full ownership of the trading data you enter into the platform. We do not claim any rights over your data. You can export your data at any time.

6. Acceptable Use

You agree not to:

  • Attempt to reverse engineer, copy, or redistribute the platform.
  • Use the Service for any unlawful purpose.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to other users' data.
  • Use automated tools to scrape or extract data from the platform.

7. Disclaimer — Not Financial Advice

MXOEDGE is a journaling and analytics tool. Nothing on the platform constitutes financial advice, investment recommendations, or trading signals. Trading financial instruments involves risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. You trade at your own risk.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, MXOEDGE shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service, including any trading losses.

9. Service Availability

We aim for high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We may perform maintenance, updates, or changes to the Service at any time.

10. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. You may close your account at any time by contacting
